## Plugin reference

- Description: ConfigStore abstraction and JSONC-on-disk backend. Reads/writes formatted JSONC files with atomic writes and file-watching.
- Exports (core):
  - Types: `ConfigStore`, `Disposable`, `JsonValue`
- Exports (server):
  - Values: `getConfigStore`
